channel.title: backend on Patrick Armengol
channel.description: Recent content in backend on Patrick Armengol

item.title: Backend Learning Plan
item.description: Skills Internet Basics HTTP DNS how do browsers work? Frontend Basics HTML CSS Javascript General terminal usage operating systems process management threads and concurrency memory management interprocess communication i/o management POSIX basics networking concepts Python see Python Learning Plan Python Frameworks Django Flask FastAPI Databases PostgreSQL SQLite MongoDB ORMs ACID transactions N + 1 problem database normalization data replication sharding strategies CAP theorem APIs REST JSON gRPC OpenAPI spec Authentication and Authorization basic auth cookies and sessions JSON web tokens OAuth (Google, GitHub) SAML auth libraries (passport, grant) password hashing (bcrypt) Web Security SSL/TLS HTTPS CSP CORS OWASP top 10 Caching client-side server-side CDN Testing integration testing unit testing functional testing CI/CD ?
